zh.Apremont, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, F: 法國哈帕格-亞登阿爾登斯阿普雷蒙特
zh.Villers-la-Ville, Brabant Wallon, Belgiq: 比利時布拉班特 瓦隆維勒斯-拉-維爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Gobert VI le Bienheureux d'Aspremont於從1188年到1202年出生在法國崔傑阿普雷蒙特時，他的父親Geoffroy d'Aspremont et de Dun I40歲，母親Elisabeth de Dampierre43歲。他和Julienne de Chaumont Rosoy至少有1個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1263年8月27日在比利時布拉班特 瓦隆維勒斯-拉-維爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gobert VI le Bienheureux d'Aspremont于从1188年到1202年出生在法国崔傑阿普雷蒙特时，他的父亲Geoffroy d'Aspremont et de Dun I40岁，母亲Elisabeth de Dampierre43岁。他和Julienne de Chaumont Rosoy至少有1个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于1263年8月27日在比利时布拉班特 瓦隆維勒斯-拉-維爾。

nameMeanings.name: Gobert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

nameMeanings.name: VI
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

nameMeanings.name: le
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Lewis   or respelling of   Lou  , as borne by the impresario  Lew Grade  (  1906–98 , originally  Louis Winogradsky ).

en.lifeSummary: When Gobert VI le Bienheureux d'Aspremont was born from 1188 to 1202, in Apremont, Cher, Centre, France, his father, Geoffroy d'Aspremont et de Dun I, was 40 and his mother, Elisabeth de Dampierre, was 43. He had at least 1 son and 1 daughter with Julienne de Chaumont Rosoy. He died on 27 August 1263, in Villers-la-Ville, Walloon Brabant, Belgium.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gobert VI le Bienheureux d'Aspremont est né du 1188 au 1202, à Apremont, Cher, Centre, France, son père, Geoffroy d'Aspremont et de Dun I, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Elisabeth de Dampierre, avait 43 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille avec Julienne de Chaumont Rosoy. Il est décédé le 27 août 1263, à Villers-la-Ville, Brabant wallon, Belgique.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gobert VI le Bienheureux d'Aspremont von 1188 bis 1202 in Apremont, Cher, Centre, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Geoffroy d'Aspremont et de Dun I 40 und seine Mutter Elisabeth de Dampierre 43. Er hatte mit Julienne de Chaumont Rosoy mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 27. August 1263 in Villers-la-Ville, Wallonisch Brabant, Belgien.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gobert VI le Bienheureux d'Aspremont è nato il da 1188 a 1202 nel Apremont, Cher, Centre, Francia, il suo padre, Geoffroy d'Aspremont et de Dun I, aveva 40 anni e il suo madre, Elisabeth de Dampierre, aveva 43 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia con Julienne de Chaumont Rosoy. Morì il 27 agosto 1263, nel Villers-la-Ville, Brabant wallon, Belgio.

ja.lifeSummary: Gobert VI le Bienheureux d'Aspremontがから1188年まで1202年にフランスセントアチャーアプレモントで生まれた時，父Geoffroy d'Aspremont et de Dun Iは40歳，母Elisabeth de Dampierreは43歳であった。彼はJulienne de Chaumont Rosoyとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1263年8月27日にベルギーブラバント ワロンヴィラース-ラ-ヴィルで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Gobert VI le Bienheureux d'Aspremont(이)가 1188년 부터 1202년 까지 프랑스 세트르 처 에프렘트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Geoffroy d'Aspremont et de Dun I(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Elisabeth de Dampierre(은)는 43세였다. 그는 Julienne de Chaumont Rosoy(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1263년 8월 27일 벨기에 브라반트 월런 비레르스-라-빌에서 사망했다.

lv.from 1188 to 1202–27 août 1263: no 1188. gada līdz 1202. gadam–1263. gada 27. augusts

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gobert VI le Bienheureux d'Aspremont nasceu de 1188 a 1202, em Apremont, Cher, Centre, França, seu pai, Geoffroy d'Aspremont et de Dun I, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Elisabeth de Dampierre, tinha 43 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha com Julienne de Chaumont Rosoy. Ele faleceu em 27 de agosto de 1263, em Villers-la-Ville, Brabant wallon, Bélgica.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gobert VI le Bienheureux d'Aspremont родился с 1188 по 1202 в местности апремонт, чир, кентр, Франция, его отцу по имени Geoffroy d'Aspremont et de Dun I было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Elisabeth de Dampierre, 43. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь от Julienne de Chaumont Rosoy. Он умер 27 августа 1263 г. в местности виллирс-ла-вилл, брабант валлон, Бельгия.
